title: Agent Technical Traces (Paypload Audit)
description: Deep trace of LLM prompts and Tool payloads. [FILTERS]: User ID, Session ID (Required for Deep Dive)

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.${bq_table}` WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY user_id
SELECT DISTINCT session_id FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.${bq_table}` WHERE user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY session_id DESC

options.content: 🏠 Home 💰 FinOps 💬 Transcripts ⚙️ Diagnostics 🔍 Traces ❓ Help

panels.title: 🧠 Agent Reasoning Logs (LLM Traces)
panels.description: Deep trace of prompts sent to the LLM and the responses received.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp as time, agent, model, prompt_tokens as inp, completion_tokens as out, calculated_usd_cost as usd, response FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_llm_calls` WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id LIKE '${session_id:raw}' AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}' ORDER BY time DESC

panels.title: 🛠️ Raw Tool Traces (Payloads)
panels.description: Deep audit of tool arguments and execution results.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp as time, tool_name, status, latency_ms as ms, input_args, output_result FROM `${gcp_project}.${bq_dataset}.v_tool_usage` WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND session_id LIKE '${session_id:raw}' AND user_id LIKE '${user_id:raw}' ORDER BY time DESC
